entity: Magic Johnson All-Star selections = 12 (BBR-canonical and warehouse value agree)

query_target.sql: SELECT cast(count(DISTINCT season) AS INTEGER) AS n FROM fact_award WHERE player_id = 77142 AND award_type = 'All-Star'

notes: Magic Johnson's 12 All-Star selections (2 AS-MVP). BBR and warehouse agree exactly. Retired, so count is fixed at 12. CAST(... AS INTEGER) keeps the count as a JSON number (not BIGINT-as-string) so the equals comparison is numeric.
